name: O.R.C. Spiderling
description: The O.R.C. Spiderling is a light swarm unit used to harass in groups. Alone it is still fragile, but in numbers it can distract you until larger spiders arrive.
behavior: It scurries between nearby nests, webs, and O.R.C. points on very short routes. As soon as it detects something, it accelerates and tries to add pressure with the rest of the swarm.
interactionWithPlayer: It becomes hostile instantly and rarely appears alone. If you ignore it while focusing on a larger enemy, it will keep interrupting heals, repositioning, and punish windows.
interactionWithCreatures: It usually accompanies other O.R.C. spiders and serves as cheap support for finishing off targets already pinned by the main group.
strategy: It dies quickly, so remove it before it starts ruining the rest of the fight. The real mistake is letting several live while a larger enemy is already pressuring you.

abilities.name: Bite
abilities.description: A simple quick bite meant to harass and keep you occupied.
